Event: Cornucopia Island June 2026
Event Date: 08/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI335
Astral Sapphire Ring

Once in a while for 4 sec., when the ring's wearer receives a negative effect, the unit deals 375000 pure damage to all enemy units, removes 2 random positive effects from each of the targets, and has a 50% chance to stun each of the affected enemy units for 2 sec. The damage dealing triggers at most once every 8 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
